1.gl: to be clear (orig. of sound, but usually of color); to shine; hence, to make ashow, to boast; and thus to be (clamorously) foolish; to rave; causatively, to celebrate; also to stultify
1.kj: (make) boast (self), celebrate, commend, (deal, make), fool(-ish, -ly), glory, give (light), be (make, feign self) mad (against), give in marriage, (sing, be worthy of) praise, rag
behold (by mistake for H7789 (שׁוּר)), sing(-er, -ing man, -ing woman).
1.dv: or (the original form) שׁוּר; (1 Samuel 18:6), a primitive root (rather identical with H7788 (שׁוּר) through the idea of strolling minstrelsy);

1.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
1.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).
Jah, the Lord, most vehement. Compare names in '-iah,' '-jah.'
1.dv: contraction for H3068 (יְהֹוָה), and meaning the same;

1.kj: godly (man), good, holy (one), merciful, saint, (un-) godly.

2.gl: a son (as a builder of the family name), in the widest sense (of literal and figurative relationship, including grandson, subject, nation, quality or condition, etc., (like father or brother), etc.)

2.gl: probably to brighten up, i.e. (figuratively) be (causatively, make) blithe or gleesome
2.kj: cheer up, be (make) glad, (have, make) joy(-ful), be (make) merry, (cause to, make to) rejoice, [idiom] very.

2.gl: properly, to spin round (under the influence of any violent emotion), i.e. usually rejoice, or (as cringing) fear
2.kj: be glad, joy, be joyful, rejoice.
2.dv: or (by permutation) גּוּל; a primitive root;

2.gl: Tsijon (as a permanent capital), a mountain of Jerusalem

2.gl: Jisrael, a symbolical name of Jacob; also (typically) of his posterity
2.dv: from H8280 (שָׂרָה) and H410 (אֵל); he will rule as God;

3.gl: to be clear (orig. of sound, but usually of color); to shine; hence, to make ashow, to boast; and thus to be (clamorously) foolish; to rave; causatively, to celebrate; also to stultify

3.kj: give praise, sing forth praises, psalms.

from a unused root meaning to twang;

4.dv: a primitive root; also denominative from H6288 (פְּאֹרָה),

4.gl: depressed (figuratively), in mind (gentle) or circumstances (needy, especially saintly)

Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
4.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

5.gl: properly, to creak (or emit a stridulous sound), i.e. to shout (usually for joy)
5.kj: aloud for joy, cry out, be joyful (greatly, make to) rejoice, (cause to) shout (for joy), (cause to) sing (aloud, for joy, out), triumph.

5.gl: properly, weight, but only figuratively in a good sense, splendor or copiousness
a bed (figuratively, a bier); abstractly, sleep; by euphemism, carnal intercourse

5.kj: godly (man), good, holy (one), merciful, saint, (un-) godly.
